regimens.regimen_name: FLOT

trial_data.notes: Median OS was increased in the FLOT group compared with the ECF group [168].

regimens.notes: Preferred for medically fit patients with good performance status. Infusional fluorouracil can be replaced with capecitabine. Leucovorin is indicated with certain fluorouracil-based regimens [168].

regimens.regimen_name: FLOT + durvalumab for PD-L1 CPS ≥1 or TAP ≥1%
regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Durvalumab added to FLOT. For diffuse type EGJ adenocarcinoma, no overall survival advantage [Tabernero J, et al. Annals of Oncology 2025;36:S1623-S1624].

regimens.notes: Category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma. Requires PD-L1 CPS ≥1 or TAP ≥1%. For clinical node negative tumor (category 2A) [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: FLOT + durvalumab for clinical node negative tumor
regimens.notes: Added sub-bullet for clinical node negative tumor [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: FLOT + durvalumab for PD-L1 CPS <1 or TAP <1%
regimens.notes: Added sub-bullet for PD-L1 CPS <1 or TAP <1% [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: FLOT + durvalumab for diffuse type EGJ adenocarcinoma
regimens.notes: Added sub-bullet for diffuse type EGJ adenocarcinoma. In the MATTERHORN trial, diffuse type gastric or EGJ adenocarcinoma showed no overall survival advantage when durvalumab was added to FLOT [ESOPH-F 3 of 12, footnote d].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and cisplatin

trial_data.notes: Perioperative chemotherapy with fluorouracil and cisplatin significantly increased curative resection rate, DFS, and OS [4].

regimens.notes: Other recommended perioperative regimen [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine and oxaliplatin
regimens.notes: The use of this regimen and dosing schedules is based on extrapolations from published literature and clinical practice [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Dostarlimab-gxly for neoadjuvant therapy only
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: For neoadjuvant therapy only in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Nivolumab and ipilimumab followed by nivolumab
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: For neoadjuvant or perioperative therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Pembrolizumab for neoadjuvant or perioperative
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: For neoadjuvant or perioperative therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Tremelimumab and durvalumab for neoadjuvant therapy only
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: For neoadjuvant therapy only in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Paclitaxel and carboplatin for definitive chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Preferred regimen for definitive chemoradiation. Infusional fluorouracil can be replaced with capecitabine [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and oxaliplatin for definitive chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Preferred regimen for definitive chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and cisplatin for definitive chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for definitive chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Irinotecan and cisplatin for definitive chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for definitive chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Paclitaxel and fluoropyrimidine for definitive chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for definitive chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Paclitaxel and carboplatin for preoperative chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma

trial_data.notes: Median OS was 49 months in the preoperative chemoradiation arm compared to 24 months in the surgery alone arm [5].

regimens.notes: Preferred regimen for preoperative chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and oxaliplatin for preoperative chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma

trial_data.notes: Median PFS was 9.7 months in the FOLFOX group compared to 9.4 months in the fluorouracil and cisplatin group [6,7,9].

regimens.notes: Preferred regimen for preoperative chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and cisplatin for preoperative chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma

trial_data.notes: Median OS was 4.5 years in the preoperative chemoradiation group versus 1.8 years in the surgery alone group [10,11,12].

regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for preoperative chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Irinotecan and cisplatin for preoperative chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for preoperative chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Paclitaxel and fluoropyrimidine for preoperative chemoradiation
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma
regimens.notes: Other recommended regimen for preoperative chemoradiation [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Nivolumab for postoperative therapy
regimens.site: Esophageal and esophagogastric junction adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma

biomarkers.requirement: after preoperative chemoradiation with R0 resection and residual disease

trial_data.notes: Median DFS was significantly longer in the nivolumab group compared to the placebo group [25].

regimens.notes: Only after preoperative chemoradiation with R0 resection and residual disease [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Capecitabine and oxaliplatin for postoperative therapy

trial_data.notes: Improved 3-year DFS for all disease stages [26].

regimens.notes: Other recommended postoperative regimen [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluorouracil and oxaliplatin for postoperative therapy
regimens.notes: Other recommended postoperative regimen [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine before and after fluoropyrimidine-based chemoradiation for postoperative therapy
regimens.notes: Other recommended postoperative regimen [ESOPH-F 3 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, and trastuzumab for first-line HER2-positive adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Significant improvement in median OS with the addition of trastuzumab to chemotherapy [31].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-positive adenocarcinoma. Trastuzumab should be added to first-line chemotherapy [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, trastuzumab, and pembrolizumab for first-line HER2-positive adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1

trial_data.notes: Improved ORR with pembrolizumab compared to placebo [32,33].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-positive adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1 [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, cisplatin, and trastuzumab for first-line HER2-positive adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Significant improvement in median OS with the addition of trastuzumab to chemotherapy [34].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-positive adenocarcinoma [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, cisplatin, trastuzumab, and pembrolizumab for first-line HER2-positive adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1

trial_data.notes: Improved ORR with pembrolizumab compared to placebo [32,33].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-positive adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1 [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, and nivolumab for first-line HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1
regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for PD-L1 CPS ≥5; category 2B for PD-L1 CPS <5

trial_data.os: 14.4 vs. 11.1 months; HR, .71; P < .0001 for CPS ≥5
trial_data.pfs: 7.7 vs. 6 months; HR, .68; P < .0001 for CPS ≥5
trial_data.notes: Significant improvements in OS and PFS with nivolumab plus chemotherapy [35].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1. Category 1 for CPS ≥5; category 2B for CPS <5 [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, and pembrolizumab for first-line HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1
regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for PD-L1 CPS ≥5; category 2B for PD-L1 CPS <5

trial_data.os: 12.6 vs. 9.8 months; HR, 0.65; P < .0001 for CPS ≥5
trial_data.pfs: 7.5 vs. 5.5 months; HR, 0.51; P < .0001 for CPS ≥5
trial_data.notes: Significant improvements in OS and PFS with pembrolizumab plus chemotherapy [36,37].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1. Category 1 for CPS ≥5; category 2B for CPS <5 [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, and tislelizumab-jsgr for first-line HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1
regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for PD-L1 CPS ≥5; category 2B for PD-L1 CPS <5

trial_data.notes: Tislelizumab plus chemotherapy versus placebo plus chemotherapy [38].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with PD-L1 CPS ≥1. Category 1 for CPS ≥5; category 2B for CPS <5 [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fluoropyrimidine, oxaliplatin, and zolbetuximab-clzb for first-line HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with CLDN18.2 positive
regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 in CLDN18.2-positive gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma [39,40].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-negative adenocarcinoma with CLDN18.2 positive. Category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.notes: Preferred for HER2-negative adenocarcinoma [ESOPH-F 4 of 12].

regimens.evidence_level: category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Significantly longer median OS with ramucirumab plus paclitaxel compared to paclitaxel alone [69].

regimens.notes: Preferred for second-line or subsequent therapy. Category 1 for EGJ adenocarcinoma; category 2A for esophageal adenocarcinoma [ESOPH-F 6 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Fam-trastuzumab deruxtecan-nxki for second-line HER2-positive adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Significant improvements in OS, PFS, and ORR with fam-trastuzumab deruxtecan-nxki compared to chemotherapy [70,71].

regimens.notes: Preferred for second-line or subsequent therapy for HER2-positive adenocarcinoma [ESOPH-F 6 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Docetaxel for second-line adenocarcinoma

trial_data.notes: Significant increase in 12-month OS with docetaxel compared to active symptom control alone [60,61].

regimens.notes: Preferred for second-line or subsequent therapy [ESOPH-F 6 of 12].

trial_data.notes: Similar OS between paclitaxel and irinotecan [56,57,72].

regimens.regimen_name: Pembrolizumab for TMB-H SCC in second-line

trial_data.notes: ORR was 29% in patients with TMB-H tumors [50,88].

regimens.notes: For second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with TMB-H tumors [ESOPH-F 7 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Dostarlimab-gxly for MSI-H/dMMR SCC in second-line

trial_data.notes: ORR was 42% in patients with dMMR solid tumors [51].

regimens.notes: For second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors [ESOPH-F 7 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Dabrafenib and trametinib for BRAF V600E-mutated SCC

trial_data.notes: ORR was 38% in patients with BRAF V600E-mutated tumors [89].

regimens.notes: For second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with BRAF V600E-mutated tumors [ESOPH-F 7 of 12].

regimens.regimen_name: Selpercatinib for RET gene fusion-positive SCC

trial_data.notes: ORR was 44% in patients with RET fusion-positive tumors [90].

regimens.notes: For second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with RET gene fusion-positive tumors [ESOPH-F 7 of 12].
